changelog: Fix: Clean rebuild — stale JS bundle replaced, version display now correct (v0.9.11 Build 16)
Fix: TUN routing EPERM — bindSocket failure is now a warning, not fatal disconnect
Fix: CONNECTED state uses process-health fallback when bindSocket EPERM occurs
New: Version debug panel in Settings shows JS bundle version and OTA server version
New: Fallback validation confirms Xray + tun2socks alive + TUN interface present on EPERM
